## PR safety checklist

- [ ] Target repository is `ShawnSantiago/jcode` unless upstream was explicitly requested.
- [ ] Head branch is a feature branch, not `master`, unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Diff was checked for local artifacts, logs, runtime state, and generated files.
- [ ] Diff was checked for secrets: `.env`, tokens, API keys, cookies, private keys, credentials.
- [ ] No `.omx/artifacts/`, `.jcode/pr-feedback-watch/`, overnight runtime state, or local logs are included.
